goal: Predict bulk_modulus, density, tg for PVNL/PVC (*CC(Cl)*)
assumptions: SMILES *CC(Cl)* is PVC (CH2-CHCl): the PVNL member with the chloride substituent. Member disambiguated by substituent (Cl) — class experimental_tg_K is a dict {PVA:303, PVC:354, PVAc:304}; PVC scalar pinned so downstream Tg/density/K gates compare against PVC, not the class default. Member values: Tg=354 K, exp density=1.38 g/cm3, exp K_T=4.0 GPa.
polymer_rules.json PVNL temperatures are class-specific (medium confidence) — group-contribution estimation skipped per confidence_gate.

uncertainties.name: ff_transferability
uncertainties.note: PCFF for PVC: Cl partial charges on backbone carbons make density/Tg sensitive to PPPM + charge embedding. EMC/PCFF build-tested PASS for PVC but no class-specific MD Tg paper. A small-cell NPT density screen vs 1.38 g/cm3 would reduce FF transferability uncertainty cheaply. Recorded as planned, not executed.

uncertainties.name: hardware_optimum
uncertainties.note: hardware_policy.values_are_benchmarked=false AND directional_probe host (4x A800/32 cores) != live host (4x Quadro RTX 6000/18 cores). by_forcefield[pcff] default kept (no D-08 override); a hardware_benchmark probe on the built cell would clean-benchmark this host.

evidence.claim: EMC/PCFF (Class II) build-tested PASS for PVC; OPLS-AA FAILED for PVC. PCFF has full parameter coverage for the C/H/Cl backbone (no missing increments). COMPASS/PCFF-family validated for vinyl polymers.

alternatives.rejected_reason: OPLS-AA build FAILED for PVC (and PVAc) per polymer_rules.json ff_note — no parameter coverage path.
Retired route for this class; replaced by EMC/PCFF.

evidence.claim: PCFF assigns charges via bond-increment rules at typing time (charge_method=none means no separate QM charge job). PVC backbone carbons carry significant Cl-induced partial charges; bond-increment charges are consistent with the PCFF FF and adequate for the polar (non-aromatic) vinyl side group. PPPM (D-03) handles the resulting long-range Coulomb.
evidence.citation: polymer_rules.json PVNL charge_method=none; EMC/PCFF embeds charges

alternatives.note: Adequate for polar vinyl side chains without aromatic conjugation per class notes, but tied to the retired RadonPy/GAFF2 route — not used with the EMC/PCFF path.

evidence.claim: PVC has a backbone heteroatom (Cl) giving significant partial charges on backbone carbons (|q|>0.1e) — pppm REQUIRED per the electrostatics decision guide; neglecting long-range Coulomb would bias density/Tg 5-20% for this polar polymer.

alternatives.rejected_reason: Only valid for pure C/H backbones; PVC's Cl makes lj_cut invalid.

evidence.claim: DP=60 is well above the Fox-Flory plateau (DP>=20) required for Tg, and above PVNL dp_min=30 for bulk_modulus finite-size convergence. nchain=10 gives ~4800 all-atom atoms (8 atoms/monomer x 60 x 10) — large enough to avoid self-imaging at the 12 A cutoff while staying within GPU budget.
experimental comparators pinned to the PVC member (not the PVNL class dict)

PVC at T_workflow_K=530 K equilibrates the melt then cools; at DP=60 (>=30) melt chain self-diffusion is unattainable on MD timescales (measured tau_relax ~3.6e9 ps for DP=60 PVC), so overall_pass via C(t) decay is unsatisfiable by construction. Gate on density plateau within experimental range + homogeneity CV<0.25 + P2 nematic<0.10 + energy drift bounds; diffusion metrics advisory. The 5-cycle high-T anneal (610 K) substitutes for melt self-diffusion.

decisions.choice: bilinear fit, sweep 150-550 K brackets PVC Tg=354 K

evidence.claim: Tg sweep 150-550 K at 20 K steps gives 21 bins and brackets PVC exp Tg=354 K with wide margin on both sides (MD Tg expected 380-470 K after 80-120 K overestimation — still inside range). Multirate (40/160/400 K/ns) enables cooling-rate extrapolation; require bilinear R^2>=0.80 and loglinear R^2>=0.90 across >=2 rates.
evidence.citation: polymer_rules.json PVNL tg_* params; PVC exp Tg=354 K

decisions.choice: Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K (glassy K); deform fallback

evidence.claim: PVC is glassy at 300 K (exp Tg=354 K > 300 K), so bulk_modulus via Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K (symmetric +/-1000 atm, cell-size independent; Wu 2019 validated). Born+NVT REMOVED pipeline-wide (PCFF+PPPM virial incompatibility, K_Born 8-15x too high, failed 3/3 incl. PVC1, 2026-06-21). 3-direction uniaxial deform is the fallback if Murnaghan fit_converged=False or B0_prime outside [4,20]. Compare to exp K_T=4.0 GPa (Mark 2007 Tait params, glassy PVC 25C).

alternatives.rejected_reason: Retired 2026-06-21: PCFF+PPPM virial incompatibility, failed 3/3 pipeline runs (PMMA4/PVC1/PEEK1).

evidence.claim: PCFF (class2+PPPM) routes to the KOKKOS full-offload default (engine=kokkos, mpi=1, 1 GPU/run): pair+class2 bonded+pppm+neigh all on the GPU. Estimated cell ~4800 atoms (8 atoms/monomer x DP60 x 10 chains) is <10k so 1 GPU is correct (no multi-GPU pin). Adopting the by_forcefield[pcff] default — NOT directional_probe.recommended_by_ff — because values_are_benchmarked=false AND the probe host (4x A800/32 cores, 2026-06-21) does not match the live host (4x Quadro RTX 6000/18 cores). directional_probe ns/day (42.8 pcff) is a HINT only; run-0 parity vs CPU class2 PASSED (0.000%, 2026-06-20) which justifies the kokkos engine default itself.

alternatives.note: documented PCFF fallback if KOKKOS binary unavailable.

findings: Gate verified independently: PVNL confidence=medium requires reasoned mode; plan_mode=reasoned matches (no confidence-gate bypass).

D-01..D-07: all criteria_evaluated cover policy evaluate lists; evidence_required decisions (D-01/D-03/D-07) carry source_doi/citation; D-05 require_glassy correctly invoked for DP=60>=30 glassy PVC (authorized 2026-06-20); member disambiguation pins PVC comparators (Tg 354 K, density 1.38, K_T 4.0 GPa) over the PVNL class dict.

D-08_hardware: pinned {kokkos, gpu=1, mpi=1} equals the by_forcefield.pcff default (not recommended_by_ff); mpi=1 is canonical for PCFF/KOKKOS (kspace on GPU); ~4800-atom cell <10k -> 1 GPU; planner correctly declined the A800/host-mismatched directional_probe and recorded a hardware_benchmark probe with confidence:low. No violation.

Stage schema: all planned_stages have stage/track/success_criteria; tracks valid and mappings consistent. Dominant uncertainty (ff_transferability) named; reduction probes fast_density_screen + hardware_benchmark are valid keys.
